qa_pairs.question: How are single-letter `tar` options typically combined?
qa_pairs.answer: Single-letter options for the `tar` command can be combined with a single dash.

qa_pairs.question: Can you provide an example of combining single-letter `tar` options?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, `tar -cJf project1.tar.zx project1` is an example of combining single-letter `tar` options.

qa_pairs.question: What is the full-word equivalent of the `tar -cJf project1.tar.zx project1` command?
How can I view a complete list of `tar` options available on my system?
qa_pairs.answer: You can get a complete list of `tar` options available on your system by using `man tar` or `tar --help`.

qa_pairs.question: Are all systems compatible with `tar`'s `--xz` compression option?
qa_pairs.answer: No, some older systems might not support `--xz` compression.
